_note: BULK TEST/DEMO placeholder data for pagination/filter testing. NOT sourced from an official database. Skill/qualification/major NAMES are real (real certs, real degree names) but the occupation-to-skill/qual/major pairings and descriptions are synthetic test fixtures, not verified official associations.
